retrieved_result: Choosing the Best Canon Speedlite Flash for Your Needs Choosing the Best Canon Speedlite Flash for Your Needs As Canon continues to expand the Speedlite family, more photographers struggle to know which flash to buy. So let’s take a quick run through the current Speedlite lineup, from low end to high end, to see if we can determine which flash is right
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses photography equipment (Canon Speedlite flash) and not database query optimization.
